distIndexGzipBytes.note: Current preview gzip size plus a 10% release guard.

normalizeMediumMs.note: Median local measurement plus the larger of 15% or a 1ms CI-noise floor.

diffMediumMs.note: Median local measurement after adding graphDiff plus the larger of 15% or a 1ms CI-noise floor.

topologyMediumMs.note: Median local measurement plus the larger of 15% or a 1ms CI-noise floor.

indexesMediumMs.note: Median local measurement plus the larger of 15% or a 1ms CI-noise floor.

spatialIndexMediumMs.note: Median local measurement plus the larger of 15% or a 1ms CI-noise floor.
